steps.t: Losdirith watches the gate to the garden of Lady Galadriel, south along the path from the pavilion where Demlindeth sings songs of mourning. Demlindet…
Telain Neduil consists of a series of flets north-west of Galadriel's Garden in Caras Galadhon, and the leaves grow over the edge of one of its flets.…
Losdirith is outside the entrance to Galadriel's Garden. Losdirith will want to hear what you saw when you looked through the canopy of leaves at Tela…
